iQOO Hackathon 2026 Delhi NCR: Registration, Challenges, Schedule, Eligibility & Complete Details

NotesGallery Bureau | Published: 29/5/2026
Google AdSense - AMP Inline

Are you passionate about Artificial Intelligence, mobile app development, and innovative technology solutions? The iQOO Hackathon 2026 Delhi NCR is an exciting opportunity for students, developers, designers, and AI enthusiasts to showcase their creativity in an 8-hour offline AI-native build sprint.

Scheduled to take place at COWRKS DLF Cybercity, Gurugram, this hackathon will bring together some of the brightest minds to build innovative AI-powered solutions using iQOO smartphones and modern AI technologies.

In this article, we cover everything you need to know about the iQOO Hackathon 2026, including registration dates, problem statements, schedule, team size, venue, and expected rewards.

What is iQOO Hackathon 2026?

The iQOO Hackathon 2026 – Delhi NCR is an offline innovation challenge where participants will work in teams to create AI-native applications and solutions within an intensive 8-hour sprint.

Participants will get the opportunity to build and demonstrate their projects directly on iQOO smartphones while solving real-world challenges related to productivity, education, content creation, and innovation.

Event Highlights

Why Participate in iQOO Hackathon 2026?

The hackathon offers much more than prizes.

Participants can:

  • Build AI-powered products in a real-world environment.
  • Showcase their talent before industry experts.
  • Network with developers, founders, and AI professionals.
  • Gain practical experience working with mobile-first AI solutions.
  • Receive participation certificates.
  • Get exposure to cutting-edge AI workflows and tools.

iQOO Hackathon 2026 Problem Statements

Participants can choose from multiple challenge tracks.

1. OPEN – Open Innovation

This is a wildcard category where teams can create any AI-powered solution.

Requirements:

  • Free-form innovation.
  • AI integration is mandatory.
  • Final demo must run on an iQOO smartphone.

2. PS 1 – AgentKit

Theme:

Multi-Agent AI System for Student Productivity

Teams must build intelligent AI agents that help students manage daily academic activities.

Possible Features

  • AI study assistant
  • Voice-controlled task management
  • Smart scheduling
  • Assignment tracking
  • Learning recommendations

The smartphone acts as the primary interface while agents can run on cloud infrastructure or laptops through iQOO Office Kit.

3. PS 2 – CampusOS

Theme:

One Intelligent Operating System for Campus Life

This challenge focuses on building a comprehensive student ecosystem.

Suggested Features

  • Smart timetable management
  • Hindi-English OCR note scanning
  • Lecture transcription
  • AI-generated flashcards
  • Mess menu assistant
  • Expense splitting tools
  • Placement preparation assistant
  • Lifestyle intelligence dashboard

The solution should leverage the large iQOO 2K display experience and integrate seamlessly with laptops through Office Kit.

4. PS 3 – BrandForge

Theme:

Autonomous AI Social Media Engine

Participants need to create AI systems that automate content creation for brands.

Potential Capabilities

  • Trend analysis
  • Social media monitoring
  • RAG-based brand voice understanding
  • Reel script generation
  • Carousel post creation
  • X (Twitter) thread generation
  • Multi-modal content production

The objective is to transform a single input into complete social media campaigns.

iQOO Hackathon 2026 Schedule

Below is the complete event timeline:

Venue Details

Location

COWRKS DLF Cybercity, Gurugram

The venue is located in one of India’s leading technology and corporate hubs, providing participants with a professional innovation environment.

Team Size and Eligibility

Team Size

  • Individual participation allowed.
  • Teams can have up to 3 members.

Ideal Participants

  • College students
  • AI enthusiasts
  • Software developers
  • Product builders
  • Startup founders
  • Designers
  • Machine Learning practitioners

Rewards and Benefits

The official prize pool has not yet been announced.

However, participants can expect:

  • Winning prizes
  • Certificates
  • Networking opportunities
  • Industry exposure
  • Mentorship interactions
  • Recognition among top innovators

The organizers have stated that detailed reward information will be revealed soon.

How to Prepare for iQOO Hackathon 2026?

To maximize your chances of success:

1. Learn AI Tools

Get comfortable with:

  • LLMs
  • RAG systems
  • AI agents
  • OCR technologies
  • Speech-to-text APIs

2. Build Mobile-First Experiences

Since solutions must work effectively on iQOO smartphones, focus on:

  • Responsive UI
  • Mobile optimization
  • Fast performance

3. Prepare a Strong Pitch

Judges often evaluate:

  • Innovation
  • Problem solving
  • Technical execution
  • User experience
  • Scalability

4. Create a Working Demo

A functional prototype is usually more impactful than a complex idea without implementation.

Why This Hackathon Stands Out

Unlike traditional coding competitions, the iQOO Hackathon 2026 emphasizes:

  • AI-native development
  • Mobile-first innovation
  • Real-world applications
  • Multi-agent systems
  • Generative AI workflows

The event encourages participants to create practical products that can potentially evolve into startup ideas or commercial solutions.

You can add the official apply link inside your blog like this:

Apply Now

Interested candidates can register for the hackathon through the official registration page:

👉 Apply for iQOO Hackathon 2026 Delhi NCR

The event is an 8-hour offline AI-native build sprint scheduled at COWRKS DLF Cybercity, Gurugram, where participants can build innovative AI-powered solutions and showcase them on iQOO devices. (Reskilll)

Official Links

The hackathon supports 1–3 member teams and focuses on AI innovation through tracks like AgentKit, CampusOS, BrandForge, and Open Innovation.

Final Thoughts

The iQOO Hackathon 2026 Delhi NCR is an excellent opportunity for developers, students, and AI innovators to showcase their skills in a high-energy offline environment. With exciting problem statements such as AgentKit, CampusOS, and BrandForge, participants can work on cutting-edge AI solutions while networking with fellow innovators.

If you’re interested in Artificial Intelligence, mobile technology, and innovation, this hackathon is definitely worth considering.

FAQs

When does registration start for iQOO Hackathon 2026?

Registration opens on 6 June 2026.

Where will the hackathon be held?

The event will take place at COWRKS DLF Cybercity, Gurugram.

Is the hackathon online or offline?

It is an offline hackathon.

How many members can be in a team?

Teams can consist of 1 to 3 members.

What is the duration of the hackathon?

Participants will compete in an 8-hour AI-native build sprint.

Has the prize pool been announced?

No, the rewards and prizes are yet to be officially announced.
